name: Executive Brief Synthesis
prompt: Given 3 research snippets, produce a one-page executive brief with an executive summary, 3-5 key findings, and inline source attributions.

name: Outline Generation from Notes
prompt: Transform raw notes into a structured outline with H2/H3 sections, bullet points, and a short rationale for each major section.

name: Evidence Gap Identification
prompt: Review a short draft and list evidence gaps or weakly supported claims, suggesting specific data or sources to strengthen each.
